example_prompt: Create an invoice for a customer with line items, then share the payment URL so they can pay online.

orderDetails.description: Line items included in the invoice.

taxRate.description: Tax rate as a percentage. Default: 0.

customerId.description: Existing customer UUID. Required if not providing customer contact fields.

deliveryCharges.description: Shipping or delivery costs added to the invoice total. Default: 0.

deductedAmount.description: Global discount applied to the invoice total. Default: 0.

enableMultiplePayment.description: Allow the customer to pay in multiple installments. Default: false.

redirectUrlAfterPayment.description: HTTPS URL to redirect the customer after successful payment.

paymentUrl.description: Customer-facing payment URL. Share this link for the customer to complete payment.

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the invoice as a PDF.

finalAmount.description: Total invoice amount including taxes, delivery charges, and discounts.

details.description: Bictorys error code. Example: "E400-31: Due date is required", "E400-29: product price is missing in a Item line Object".

gotchas: This endpoint uses the invoice-management microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/invoice-management/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
orderDetails is required and must contain at least one item with name, price, and quantity. An empty array or missing field returns E400-29: product price is missing.
dueDate is required and must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Missing or wrong format returns E400-31: Due date is required.
To charge an invoice via the API (instead of having the customer open paymentUrl in a browser), use the create_charge spec with invoiceId set to the returned id.
send_notification is a query parameter (not a body field) that controls whether Bictorys emails the customer. It defaults to true — set ?send_notification=false to suppress the notification.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
